description: Add hal product plan so a solo developer can interactively create and update durable product context in .hal/product/mission.md, .hal/product/roadmap.md, and .hal/product/tech-stack.md, while keeping hal init lightweight and preserving product docs outside archive feature state.

userStories.title: Add Canonical Product Path Constants
userStories.description: As a Hal maintainer, I want canonical constants for product doc paths so that product files are referenced consistently across commands and tests.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/template/template.go defines ProductDir, ProductMissionFile, ProductRoadmapFile, and ProductTechStackFile.
A ProductFiles helper returns mission.md, roadmap.md, and tech-stack.md in deterministic order.
New product-related code paths use template constants instead of hardcoded .hal/product strings.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define Product Planning Contracts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want explicit product planning data types so that command flow and generation logic share stable contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/product/types.go defines typed structures for selected targets, collected answers, existing file state, and generated payload.
JSON parsing supports partial payloads that omit unselected files.
Malformed JSON payloads return parse errors in unit tests.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Embed Product Skill Content
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Hal-adapted product skill embedded so that prompt generation stays versioned and consistent in-repo.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/skills/product/SKILL.md exists and requires generation-only strict JSON output.
internal/skills/embed.go registers and embeds the product skill asset.
A test retrieves the embedded product skill by its expected key/name and confirms non-empty content.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Product Context Reader
userStories.description: As a developer, I want helpers to load existing product docs so that update mode can safely reason about current file state.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/product/context.go loads mission, roadmap, and tech-stack with per-file existence and content fields.
Missing files are represented as exists=false with empty content and no write side effects.
Tests cover empty state, partial state, and all-files-present state.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Selective Product Context Writer
userStories.description: As a developer, I want selective write helpers so that partial updates change only selected product files.
acceptanceCriteria: Writing selected targets creates .hal/product lazily when it does not exist.
Non-selected product files remain byte-for-byte unchanged after writes.
Tests verify unchanged bytes for non-selected files across partial updates.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Product Plan Command Skeleton And Engine Wiring
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want hal product plan wired into the command tree so that I can run product planning with a selected engine.
acceptanceCriteria: Root command includes a top-level product command with a plan subcommand.
hal product plan accepts --engine and forwards it through runProductPlanWithDeps.
Command behavior is extracted into a testable run helper rather than embedded entirely in Cobra RunE.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Preflight And Mode Selection
userStories.description: As a solo developer, I want replace/update/cancel preflight behavior so that I can safely edit existing product docs.
acceptanceCriteria: If .hal is missing, the command returns actionable error text: run 'hal init' first.
If any product file exists, the command prompts for replace all, update selected, or cancel.
Selecting cancel exits without creating or modifying product files.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Update-Selected Target Parsing
userStories.description: As a solo developer, I want concise selection input for update mode so that I can choose mission, roadmap, and tech-stack quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Update-selected mode parses concise input into the exact target set for mission, roadmap, and tech-stack.
Invalid selections return deterministic validation errors and perform no writes.
Selected targets are passed unchanged to interview and generation stages.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Collect Interview Inputs For Selected Targets
userStories.description: As a solo developer, I want targeted interview questions so that only selected product docs are discussed.
acceptanceCriteria: Mission questions run only when mission is selected.
Roadmap questions run only when roadmap is selected.
Tech-stack questions run only when tech-stack is selected and use explicit user input (no inferred standards path).
Empty answers map to deterministic placeholder/default values verified by tests.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build Generation Prompt For Strict JSON Output
userStories.description: As a developer, I want generation prompts to include complete selected context so that model output is machine-parseable and scoped.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt content includes selected targets, collected answers, and existing selected-file content.
Prompt instructions require strict JSON-only output keyed by product filenames.
Tests assert required prompt sections and exclude non-selected file context.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Enforce Strict JSON Parse And Single Repair Attempt
userStories.description: As a developer, I want robust parse and repair handling so that malformed model output never causes unsafe writes.
acceptanceCriteria: Parser rejects malformed JSON and non-object payloads.
On parse failure, the flow performs exactly one repair attempt before returning an error.
If repair fails, command returns an actionable error and performs no partial writes.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Write Only Selected Files From Generated Payload
userStories.description: As a developer, I want selective write enforcement so that extra model keys cannot modify unintended product docs.
acceptanceCriteria: Only selected target files are written even when the payload includes extra keys.
Success output lists only files created or updated in the current run.
Tests verify unknown keys are ignored and non-selected files remain unchanged.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update Init Gitignore And Migration For Product Docs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want .hal/product to be committable without eager file creation so that init stays lightweight.
acceptanceCriteria: Init ensures .gitignore includes !.hal/product/ with existing Hal exceptions.
Migration adds the missing product exception for existing repos without duplicating entries.
hal init does not create .hal/product or empty product docs by default.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Lock Archive Non-Interference For Product Docs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want archive lifecycle protections so that durable product context is never treated as feature state.
acceptanceCriteria: Archive create and restore flows do not move, overwrite, or restore .hal/product/*.
Tests verify mission, roadmap, and tech-stack files remain byte-identical across archive operations.
Feature-state file lists exclude product context files.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Product Command Metadata And Documentation Coverage
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want complete help and docs for hal product plan so that I understand when to use it versus hal plan.
acceptanceCriteria: product command family and product plan subcommand define Use, Short, Long, and Example metadata.
README and generated CLI docs include hal product plan in workflow and command reference sections.
Metadata coverage tests include the new top-level product command family.
Verify in browser (skip if no dev server running, no browser tools available, or 3 attempts fail)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
